title: ETA's Client (RP)
description:
A slight tweak to some things I made and named ETA's Client. 

Made with Blockbench
body:
**ETA's Client**
The resource pack includes some tweaks to already existing things.
These include new death messages, A new aim-like crosshair, outlined ores with the ores name (i have not yet textured all the ores), diamond and netherite short swords, and a ETAGamer-themed totem skin.

_By ETAGamer_
